title: When Will Donald Trump Release UFO Files? New Activity On alien.gov Explained
description: As alien.gov flickers to life and Donald Trump teases 'very interesting' UFO files, conspiracy forums are ablaze with speculation but hard evidence and official confirmation remain stubbornly out of reach.

title: Excellent Photo Of An Alien Craft Over India
description: 9-12-24 INDIA “I and my mom went on the terrace of our home after having dinner. We were sitting there and suddenly my mom saw something hanging in the sky. The direction was east and it was at about 50 m away from the city radio tower [...]

title: Students Witness An Alien Craft In Melboure Australia
description: 4-6-66 MELBOURNE AUSTRALIA Late in the morning, students noticed an unusual object in the sky described as a metallic, saucer like craft. Witnesses consistently reported that the object appeared to descend at high speed before hovering just above [...]

title: Congressman Calls Death Of Air Force Whistleblower Planning To Reveal UFO Secrets ‘Suspicious’
description: A 12th person can now be added to the list of those with connections to secret U.S. research who have mysteriously gone missing or passed away. At least that is the stance Congressman Eric Burlison of Missouri is taking. title: ‘Ciao UFO’ wins five including best film at Hong Kong Film Awards 2026
